mise-tasks/test/e2e/canary:1-68
  1| #!/bin/sh
  2| #MISE description="Run E2E canary tests with deterministic agents (no API calls)"
  3| #USAGE arg "[filter]" help="Test name filter (regex)" default=""
  4| 
  5| set -eu
  6| 
  7| # Build entire CLI
  8| mise run build
  9| export E2E_ENTIRE_BIN="$PWD/entire"
  10| 
  11| # Build vogon binary
  12| go build -o vogon ./e2e/vogon
  13| E2E_PATH="$PWD:$PATH"
  14| 
  15| if [ -z "${E2E_ARTIFACT_DIR:-}" ]; then
  16|   E2E_ARTIFACT_DIR="$PWD/e2e/

mise-tasks/test/ci/core:1-17
  1| #!/bin/sh
  2| #MISE description="Run non-integration Go tests with race detection for CI"
  3| 
  4| set -eu
  5| 
  6| parallel="${GO_TEST_PARALLEL:-16}"
  7| 
  8| packages="$(go list ./... | grep -v '^github.com/entireio/cli/cmd/entire/cli/integration_test$' || true)"
  9| 
  10| if [ -z "$packages" ]; then
  11|   echo "error: no non-integration packages found" >&2
  12|   exit 1
  13| fi
  14| 
  15| # Newline-separated package output from go list is safe
